Step 2: Apply waterproof color magnifier: Waterproof Color Magnifier takes lash length further as it coats with rich color that won't clump or smudge. To safeguard L'Oreal purity, reserve this product for your personal use. Always handle and apply in a careful and hygienic manner. Never apply this product in a moving vehicle. Do not dilute mascara with water, saliva, or any other substance. Cap tightly after use. If change in odor or appearance occurs, discontinue use.
